title: LoveCraft - Girlfriends <3
body:
Adds 47 unique girlfriend mobs to your world! These loyal companions can be equipped with gear and will fight alongside you.

**Features:**

✨ **Tame & Befriend** - Win them over with poppies

⚔️ **Combat Ready** - Arm them with swords or axes to fight by your side

🛡️ **Fully Equippable** - Dress them in any armor for protection

✂️ **Customizable** - Use shears to instantly remove all armor

💖 **Healable** - Restore health by feeding them any food

**Spawn Locations:**
<details>
<summary>Find them in these biomes</summary>

- Plains
- Sunflower Plains
- Flower Forest
</details>
